title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, including web scraping tools (Firecrawl, Exa), code quality filters (Caveman), model switching capabilities (Morph), and cost monitoring features. The video covers plugins from Anthropic, OpenAI, and third-party developers to extend Claude's capabilities and reduce token expenditure.
